description: Year the player was drafted into the NFL
Round in which the player was drafted
Overall pick number in the draft
NFL team that drafted the player (abbreviation)
Intended air yards — total air yards on all pass attempts
Completed air yards — air yards on completed passes only
Yards after catch on completed passes
Batted passes at the line of scrimmage
Throw-aways — intentional incompletions thrown out of bounds
Spike plays to stop the clock
Bad throws — passes deemed uncatchable / poorly placed
On-target throws — passes deemed accurate / catchable
Times the QB was blitzed (extra rushers beyond the front four)
Times the QB was hurried (forced to throw early by pressure)
Times the QB was hit while or after throwing
Total times pressured (hurries + hits + sacks combined)
Scrambles — designed pass plays where the QB ran instead
Intended air yards per pass attempt (depth of target)
Bad throw percentage — bad throws / pass attempts × 100
On-target percentage — on-target throws / pass attempts × 100
Average time in the pocket before throwing (seconds)
Number of NFL seasons with data found (capped at 2)
Comma-separated list of NFL seasons included (e.g. "2020,2021")
Boolean flag — whether advanced passing stats were available
Yards before contact per rush attempt
Yards after contact per rush attempt
Rush attempts per broken tackle (higher = fewer broken tackles)
Number of NFL seasons with rushing data found
Number of plays used to calculate PPA metrics
College interception rate — INTs / pass attempts × 100
Predicted Points Added (PPA) overall — average points added per play, all play types
PPA on passing plays — average points added per pass play
PPA on rushing plays — average points added per rush play
Overall usage rate — share of team plays involving this player (0-1 scale, higher = more involved)
Pass usage rate — share of team pass plays involving this player
Rush usage rate — share of team rush plays involving this player
Usage rate on first down plays
Usage rate on second down plays
Usage rate on third down plays
Conference the player's college team belonged to (e.g. SEC, B1G, ACC)
Number of college seasons with data found
Total yardage lost on sacks in college
College sack rate — sacks / (pass attempts + sacks)
Recruit position designation (PRO = pro-style, DUAL = dual-threat)
